docs.text: 🌟 Qwen2.5 Open Source Model Tongyi Qianwen Next-Generation Open Source Model - Breakthrough Performance Surpassing Llama-405B 🎯 Product Overview At the Yunqi Conference on September 19th, Alibaba Cloud released Tongyi Qianwen's next-generation open source model Qwen2.5, with the flagship model Qwen2.5-72B surpassing Llama-405B in performance. All Qwen2.5 series models are pre-trained on 18T tokens of data, achieving an overall performance improvement of over 18% compared to Qwen2, with more knowledge and stronger programming and mathematical capabilities. 🏆 Performance Breakthrough The Qwen2.5-72B model demonstrates excellence in multiple authoritative benchmark tests, achieving industry-leading levels in general knowledge, coding capabilities, and mathematical abilities. ✨ Core Features 📚 Extended Context Support Supports context lengths up to 128K and can generate up to 8K content, meeting the needs for long document processing and complex conversations. 🌍 Powerful Multilingual Capabilities Supports over 29 languages including Chinese, English, French, Spanish, Russian, Japanese, Vietnamese, and Arabic. 🎭 Flexible Role-Playing Can smoothly respond to diverse system prompts, enabling role-playing and chatbot tasks. 📊 Structured Data Processing Shows significant improvement in instruction following, understanding structured data (such as tables), and generating structured output (especially JSON). 🔧 Model Specifications 📦 Complete Model Series 0.5B Lightweight Deployment 1.5B Mobile Optimization 3B Edge Computing 7B General Applications 14B Enterprise Applications 32B High-Performance Services 72B Flagship Performance 📖 User Guide 💡 Quick Start After completing the model deployment, you can view the model usage instructions on the Computing Nest service instance overview page, which provides API call examples, internal network access addresses, public network access addresses, and ApiKey. 🔌 API Call Methods 🖥️ Curl Command Call 📋 Parameter Description • ${ServerIP} : IP address from internal or public network address • ${ApiKey} : ApiKey provided on the page • ${ModelName} : Model name Curl command calls can directly use the API call examples from the service instance overview page. The specific structure for calling the model API is as follows: curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "Write a letter to my daughter from the future year 2035, telling her to study technology well, become the master of technology, and promote technological and economic development; she is currently in 3rd grade" } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK Call ⚙️ Configuration Instructions • ${ApiKey} : Fill in the ApiKey from the page • ${ServerUrl} : Fill in the public or internal network address from the page, must include /v1 The following is Python example code: from openai import OpenAI ##### API Configuration ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id print(model) def main(): stream = True chat_completion = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "Hello, please introduce yourself in as much detail as possible.", } ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": main() 🌐 Web Application Access #### 📱 Access Steps 🔗 Step 1: Get Access Link On the service instance overview page, click the link corresponding to the Web application to directly access the model service Web interface. 💬 Step 2: Start Conversation Enter your question in the input box on the model service Web page to start conversing with the large language model. #### 🖼️ Interface Display 💡 Access Tips Find the link corresponding to the Web application on the service instance overview page and click it to directly access the model service Web interface. ✅ Usage Instructions Enter your questions or requirements in the input box, and the system will respond in real-time and provide corresponding model services. 🌟 Qwen2.5 Open Source Model | Performance Surpassing Llama-405B, New Benchmark for Open Source AI

All Qwen2.5 series models are pre-trained on 18T tokens of data, achieving an overall performance improvement of over 18% compared to Qwen2, with more knowledge and stronger programming and mathematical capabilities. 🏆 Performance Breakthrough The Qwen2.5-72B model demonstrates excellence in multiple authoritative benchmark tests, achieving industry-leading levels in general knowledge, coding capabilities, and mathematical abilities.

docs.text: 📋 Parameter Description • ${ServerIP} : IP address from internal or public network address • ${ApiKey} : ApiKey provided on the page • ${ModelName} : Model name Curl command calls can directly use the API call examples from the service instance overview page. The specific structure for calling the model API is as follows: curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "Write a letter to my daughter from the future year 2035, telling her to study technology well, become the master of technology, and promote technological and economic development; she is currently in 3rd grade" } ] }'
docs.title: 🖥️ Curl Command Call

docs.text: ⚙️ Configuration Instructions • ${ApiKey} : Fill in the ApiKey from the page • ${ServerUrl} : Fill in the public or internal network address from the page, must include /v1 The following is Python example code: from openai import OpenAI ##### API Configuration ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id print(model) def main(): stream = True chat_completion = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "Hello, please introduce yourself in as much detail as possible.", } ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": main()

docs.text: 简介 9 月 19 日云栖大会，阿里云发布通义千问新一代开源模型 Qwen2.5，旗舰模型 Qwen2.5-72B 性能超越 Llama-405B。Qwen2.5 全系列模型都在 18T tokens 数据上进行预训练，相比 Qwen2，整体性能提升 18%以上，拥有更多的知识、更强的编程和数学能力。Qwen2.5-72B 模型在 MMLU-rudex 基准（考察通用知识）、MBPP 基准（考察代码能力）和 MATH 基准（考察数学能力）的得分高达 86.8、88.2、83.1。 Qwen2.5 支持高达 128K 的上下文长度，可生成最多 8K 内容。模型拥有强大的多语言能力，支持中文、英文、法文、西班牙文、俄文、日文、越南文、阿拉伯文等 29 种以上语言。模型能够丝滑响应多样化的系统提示，实现角色扮演和聊天机器人等任务。在指令跟随、理解结构化数据（如表格）、生成结构化输出（尤其是 JSON）等方面 Qwen2.5 都进步明显。 语言模型方面，Qwen2.5 开源了 7 个尺寸，0.5B、1.5B、3B、7B、14B、32B、72B。通义千问 2.5-32B-Instruct（Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct）是由通义千问 2.5-32B（Qwen2.5-32B）经过指令跟随微调后得到的版本，能够根据指令和历史对话，生成符合指令的文本。 使用说明 在完成模型部署后，可以在计算巢服务实例概览页面看到模型的使用方式，里面提供了Api调用示例、内网访问地址、公网访问地址和ApiKey，下面会分别介绍如何访问使用。 API调用 Curl命令调用 Curl命令调用可以直接使用服务实例概览页面中的Api调用示例，调用模型API的具体结构如下： 其中${ServerIP}可以填写内网地址或公网地址中的IP地址，${ApiKey}为ApiKey，${ModelName}为模型名称。 curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "给闺女写一份来自未来2035的信，同时告诉她要好好学习科技，做科技的主人，推动科技，经济发展；她现在是3年级" } ] }' Python调用 以下为 Python 示例代码： 其中${ApiKey}需要填写页面上的ApiKey；${ServerUrl}需要填写页面上的公网地址或内网地址，需要带上/v1。 from openai import OpenAI ##### API 配置 ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id print(model) def main(): stream = True chat_completion = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "你好，介绍一下你自己，越详细越好。", } ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": main()

docs.text: 👁️ Qwen2.5-VL Vision-Language Model More Useful Vision-Language Model - AI Expert for Understanding Images, Videos, and Documents 🎯 Product Overview Qwen2.5-VL is a more useful vision-language model built by Alibaba Cloud's Qwen team based on Qwen2-VL and incorporating valuable feedback from numerous developers. This model has achieved significant improvements in visual understanding, agent capabilities, video analysis, visual localization, and structured output. 🚀 Core Upgrades Continuously optimized based on developer feedback, Qwen2.5-VL has achieved major breakthroughs in practicality and functional completeness, becoming a more practical vision-language AI assistant. ✨ Core Features 👁️ Visual Understanding of Objects Not only can skillfully recognize common objects such as flowers, birds, fish, and insects, but can also analyze text, charts, icons, graphics, and layouts in images. 🤖 Intelligent Agency Directly acts as a visual agent with reasoning and dynamic tool command functions, applicable for computer and mobile device operation control. 🎬 Long Video Understanding Can understand videos longer than 1 hour, with new functionality to capture events through precise localization of relevant video segments. 🎯 Visual Localization Capability Can accurately locate objects in images by generating bounding boxes or points, and can provide stable JSON output for coordinates and attributes. 📊 Structured Output For scanned data such as invoices, tables, and forms, supports structured output of their content, beneficial for applications in finance, business, and other fields. 🔍 Visual Understanding Capabilities 🌟 Comprehensive Visual Recognition 🌺 Natural Object Recognition Recognition Scope: • Flower and plant classification • Bird and animal identification • Fish and aquatic life • Insect and microorganism detection Professional-grade Accuracy 📝 Text and Chart Analysis Analysis Capabilities: • Image text extraction • Chart data interpretation • Icon and symbol recognition • Layout structure analysis Multimodal Understanding 🎨 Graphic Design Understanding Design Analysis: • Graphic element recognition • Design style analysis • Color scheme understanding • Visual hierarchy deconstruction Aesthetic Perception 🎬 Long Video Understanding ⏰ Extended Duration Video Analysis Video Length Analysis Capabilities Application Scenarios Short Videos ( < 10 minutes) Fine-grained action recognition, emotion analysis Social media content analysis Medium Videos (10-30 minutes) Event sequence understanding, topic extraction Educational training video analysis Long Videos (> 1 hour) Global understanding, event localization, segment retrieval Movie analysis, meeting records 🎯 Event Capture • Automatic key event recognition • Precise timestamp localization • Intelligent related segment retrieval • Event correlation analysis 📊 Content Understanding • Video topic extraction • Plot development tracking • Character behavior analysis • Scene change detection 🚀 Application Scenarios 💼 Business Office • Document automation processing • Invoice and receipt recognition • Table data extraction • Office workflow automation 🎓 Education and Training • Educational video analysis • Learning content extraction • Knowledge point localization • Interactive teaching assistance 🎬 Media Entertainment • Video content analysis • Highlight segment extraction • Subtitle generation optimization • Content recommendation systems 🏥 Healthcare • Medical image analysis • Medical record document processing • Examination report interpretation • Diagnostic assistance support 📖 User Guide 💡 After Deployment After completing the model deployment, you can view the model usage instructions on the Computing Nest service instance overview page, which provides API call examples, internal network access addresses, public network access addresses (available after enabling public network access), and Api_Key. 🔌 API Call Methods 🖥️ Curl Command Call 📋 Parameter Description • ${ServerIP} : IP address from internal or public network address • ${ApiKey} : ApiKey provided on the page • ${ModelName} : Model name 🖼️ Image Format Support The image_url parameter supports two formats: • HTTP URL : e.g., https://modelscope.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/resource/qwen.png • Base64 Encoding : data:image/jpeg;base64,<base64 encoded image format> Curl command calls can directly use the API call examples from the service instance overview page. The specific structure for calling the model API is as follows: curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a helpful assistant." }, { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "image_url", "image_url": { "url": "data:image/jpeg;base64,<base64 encoded image format>" } }, { "type": "text", "text": "How many sheep are there in the picture?" } ] } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK Call ⚙️ Configuration Instructions • ${ApiKey} : Fill in the ApiKey from the page • ${ServerUrl} : Fill in the public or internal network address from the page, must include /v1 The following is Python example code that supports image and video processing: import base64 import requests from openai import OpenAI ##### API Configuration ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id def encode_base64_content_from_url(content_url: str) -> str: """Encode a content retrieved from a remote url to base64 format.""" with requests.get(content_url) as response: response.raise_for_status() result = base64.b64encode(response.content).decode("utf-8") return result def infer_image(): image_url = "https://qianwen-res.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/QVQ/demo.png" stream = True image_base64 = encode_base64_content_from_url(image_url) chat_completion_from_base64 = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "Answer in Chinese, what number should be in the box in the image?", }, { "type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": f"data:image/jpeg;base64,{image_base64}"}, }, ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion_from_base64: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion_from_base64.choices[0].message.content print(result) def infer_video(): video_url = "https://pai-quickstart-predeploy-hangzhou.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/modelscope/algorithms/ms-swift/video_demo.mp4" stream = True video_base64 = encode_base64_content_from_url(video_url) chat_completion_from_base64 = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ {"type": "text", "text": "Please describe the video content"}, { "type": "video_url", "video_url": {"url": f"data:video/mp4;base64,{video_base64}"}, }, ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=512, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion_from_base64: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion_from_base64.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": infer_image() infer_video() 🌐 Web Application Access #### 📱 Access Steps 🔗 Step 1: Get Access Link On the service instance overview page, click the link corresponding to the Web application to directly access the model service Web interface. 💬 Step 2: Start Conversation Enter your question in the input box on the model service Web page to start conversing with the large language model. #### 🖼️ Interface Display 💡 Access Tips Find the link corresponding to the Web application on the service instance overview page and click it to directly access the model service Web interface. ✅ Usage Instructions Enter your questions or requirements in the input box, and the system will respond in real-time and provide corresponding model services. 👁️ Qwen2.5-VL | More Useful Vision-Language Model, AI's Eye for Understanding the World
docs.title: Index qwen2.5 vl en

docs.text: Qwen2.5-VL is a more useful vision-language model built by Alibaba Cloud's Qwen team based on Qwen2-VL and incorporating valuable feedback from numerous developers. This model has achieved significant improvements in visual understanding, agent capabilities, video analysis, visual localization, and structured output. 🚀 Core Upgrades Continuously optimized based on developer feedback, Qwen2.5-VL has achieved major breakthroughs in practicality and functional completeness, becoming a more practical vision-language AI assistant.
docs.title: 🎯 Product Overview

docs.text: 👁️ Visual Understanding of Objects Not only can skillfully recognize common objects such as flowers, birds, fish, and insects, but can also analyze text, charts, icons, graphics, and layouts in images. 🤖 Intelligent Agency Directly acts as a visual agent with reasoning and dynamic tool command functions, applicable for computer and mobile device operation control. 🎬 Long Video Understanding Can understand videos longer than 1 hour, with new functionality to capture events through precise localization of relevant video segments. 🎯 Visual Localization Capability Can accurately locate objects in images by generating bounding boxes or points, and can provide stable JSON output for coordinates and attributes. 📊 Structured Output For scanned data such as invoices, tables, and forms, supports structured output of their content, beneficial for applications in finance, business, and other fields.
docs.title: ✨ Core Features

docs.text: 💼 Business Office • Document automation processing • Invoice and receipt recognition • Table data extraction • Office workflow automation 🎓 Education and Training • Educational video analysis • Learning content extraction • Knowledge point localization • Interactive teaching assistance 🎬 Media Entertainment • Video content analysis • Highlight segment extraction • Subtitle generation optimization • Content recommendation systems 🏥 Healthcare • Medical image analysis • Medical record document processing • Examination report interpretation • Diagnostic assistance support

docs.text: 👁️ Qwen2.5-VL 视觉语言模型 更有用的视觉语言模型 - 理解图像、视频与文档的 AI 专家 🎯 产品简介 Qwen2.5-VL 是阿里云 Qwen 团队在 Qwen2-VL 基础上结合众多开发者的宝贵反馈构建的更有用的视觉语言模型。该模型在视觉理解、代理能力、视频分析、视觉定位和结构化输出等方面实现了显著提升。 🚀 核心升级 基于开发者反馈持续优化，Qwen2.5-VL 在实用性和功能完整性方面取得了重大突破，成为更加实用的视觉语言 AI 助手。 ✨ 核心功能 👁️ 视觉理解事物 不仅能够熟练识别花、鸟、鱼、昆虫等常见物体，而且还能够分析图像中的文本、图表、图标、图形和布局。 🤖 智能代理性 直接扮演视觉代理的角色，具有推理和动态指挥工具的功能，可用于电脑和手机操作控制。 🎬 长视频理解 可以理解超过 1 小时的视频，具有通过精确定位相关视频片段来捕捉事件的新功能。 🎯 视觉定位能力 可以通过生成边界框或点来准确定位图像中的对象，并且可以为坐标和属性提供稳定的 JSON 输出。 📊 结构化输出 对于发票、表格、表单等扫描件数据，支持其内容的结构化输出，有利于金融、商业等领域的应用。 🔍 视觉理解能力 🌟 全方位视觉识别 🌺 自然物体识别 识别范围： • 花卉植物分类 • 鸟类动物识别 • 鱼类水生生物 • 昆虫微生物检测 专业级精度 📝 文本图表分析 分析能力： • 图像文本提取 • 图表数据解读 • 图标符号识别 • 布局结构分析 多模态理解 🎨 图形设计理解 设计分析： • 图形元素识别 • 设计风格分析 • 色彩搭配理解 • 视觉层次解构 美学感知 🎬 长视频理解 ⏰ 超长时间视频分析 视频长度 分析能力 应用场景 短视频 ( < 10分钟) 精细动作识别、情感分析 社交媒体内容分析 中等视频 (10-30分钟) 事件序列理解、主题提取 教育培训视频分析 长视频 (> 1小时) 全局理解、事件定位、片段检索 电影分析、会议记录 🎯 事件捕捉 • 关键事件自动识别 • 精确时间戳定位 • 相关片段智能检索 • 事件关联性分析 📊 内容理解 • 视频主题提取 • 情节发展跟踪 • 人物行为分析 • 场景变化检测 🚀 应用场景 💼 商业办公 • 文档自动化处理 • 发票票据识别 • 表格数据提取 • 办公流程自动化 🎓 教育培训 • 教学视频分析 • 学习内容提取 • 知识点定位 • 互动教学辅助 🎬 媒体娱乐 • 视频内容分析 • 精彩片段提取 • 字幕生成优化 • 内容推荐系统 🏥 医疗健康 • 医学影像分析 • 病历文档处理 • 检查报告解读 • 诊断辅助支持 📖 使用说明 💡 部署完成后 在完成模型部署后，可以在计算巢服务实例概览页面看到模型的使用方式，里面提供了 API 调用示例、内网访问地址、公网访问地址（开启公网访问后会有）和 Api_Key。 🔌 API 调用方式 🖥️ Curl 命令调用 📋 参数说明 • ${ServerIP} ：内网地址或公网地址中的 IP 地址 • ${ApiKey} ：页面提供的 ApiKey • ${ModelName} ：模型名称 🖼️ 图片格式支持 image_url 参数支持两种格式： • HTTP URL ：如 https://modelscope.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/resource/qwen.png • Base64 编码 ： data:image/jpeg;base64,<图片的 base64 编码格式> Curl 命令调用可以直接使用服务实例概览页面中的 API 调用示例，调用模型 API 的具体结构如下： curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a helpful assistant." }, { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "image_url", "image_url": { "url": "data:image/jpeg;base64,<图片的 base64 编码格式>" } }, { "type": "text", "text": "How many sheep are there in the picture?" } ] } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK 调用 ⚙️ 配置说明 • ${ApiKey} ：填写页面上的 ApiKey • ${ServerUrl} ：填写页面上的公网地址或内网地址，需要带上 /v1 以下为 Python 示例代码，支持图像和视频处理： import base64 import requests from openai import OpenAI ##### API 配置 ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id def encode_base64_content_from_url(content_url: str) -> str: """Encode a content retrieved from a remote url to base64 format.""" with requests.get(content_url) as response: response.raise_for_status() result = base64.b64encode(response.content).decode("utf-8") return result def infer_image(): image_url = "https://qianwen-res.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/QVQ/demo.png" stream = True image_base64 = encode_base64_content_from_url(image_url) chat_completion_from_base64 = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "使用中文回答，图中方框处应该是数字多少?", }, { "type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": f"data:image/jpeg;base64,{image_base64}"}, }, ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion_from_base64: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion_from_base64.choices[0].message.content print(result) def infer_video(): video_url = "https://pai-quickstart-predeploy-hangzhou.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/modelscope/algorithms/ms-swift/video_demo.mp4" stream = True video_base64 = encode_base64_content_from_url(video_url) chat_completion_from_base64 = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ {"type": "text", "text": "请描述下视频内容"}, { "type": "video_url", "video_url": {"url": f"data:video/mp4;base64,{video_base64}"}, }, ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=512, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion_from_base64: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion_from_base64.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": infer_image() infer_video() 🌐 Web 应用访问 #### 📱 访问步骤 🔗 步骤一：获取访问链接 在服务实例概览页面中，点击 Web 应用对应的链接，即可直接进行模型服务 Web 访问。 💬 步骤二：开始对话 在模型服务 Web 页面输入框中输入问题，就可以和大模型进行对话了。 #### 🖼️ 界面展示 💡 访问提示 在服务实例概览页面中找到 Web 应用对应的链接，点击即可直接访问模型服务的 Web 界面。 ✅ 使用说明 在输入框中输入您的问题或需求，系统将实时响应并提供相应的模型服务，对于多模态需要输入图片的场景，可以在输入框右下角选择图片进行上传。 👁️ Qwen2.5-VL | 更有用的视觉语言模型，理解世界的 AI 之眼

docs.text: 🌟 Qwen2.5 开源模型 通义千问新一代开源模型 - 性能超越 Llama-405B 的突破之作 🎯 产品简介 9 月 19 日云栖大会，阿里云发布通义千问新一代开源模型 Qwen2.5，旗舰模型 Qwen2.5-72B 性能超越 Llama-405B。Qwen2.5 全系列模型都在 18T tokens 数据上进行预训练，相比 Qwen2，整体性能提升 18% 以上，拥有更多的知识、更强的编程和数学能力。 🏆 性能突破 Qwen2.5-72B 模型在多项权威基准测试中表现卓越，在通用知识、代码能力和数学能力方面均达到业界领先水平。 ✨ 核心特性 📚 超长上下文支持 支持高达 128K 的上下文长度，可生成最多 8K 内容，满足长文档处理和复杂对话需求。 🌍 强大多语言能力 支持中文、英文、法文、西班牙文、俄文、日文、越南文、阿拉伯文等 29 种以上语言。 🎭 灵活角色扮演 能够丝滑响应多样化的系统提示，实现角色扮演和聊天机器人等任务。 📊 结构化数据处理 在指令跟随、理解结构化数据（如表格）、生成结构化输出（尤其是 JSON）等方面进步明显。 🔧 模型规格 📦 完整模型系列 0.5B 轻量级部署 1.5B 移动端优化 3B 边缘计算 7B 通用应用 14B 企业级应用 32B 高性能服务 72B 旗舰性能 📖 使用说明 💡 快速开始 在完成模型部署后，可以在计算巢服务实例概览页面看到模型的使用方式，里面提供了 API 调用示例、内网访问地址、公网访问地址、Web应用地址和 ApiKey。 🔌 API 调用方式 🖥️ Curl 命令调用 📋 参数说明 • ${ServerIP} ：内网地址或公网地址中的 IP 地址 • ${ApiKey} ：页面提供的 ApiKey • ${ModelName} ：模型名称 Curl 命令调用可以直接使用服务实例概览页面中的 API 调用示例，调用模型 API 的具体结构如下： curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "给闺女写一份来自未来2035的信，同时告诉她要好好学习科技，做科技的主人，推动科技，经济发展；她现在是3年级" } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK 调用 ⚙️ 配置说明 • ${ApiKey} ：填写页面上的 ApiKey • ${ServerUrl} ：填写页面上的公网地址或内网地址，需要带上 /v1 以下为 Python 示例代码： from openai import OpenAI ##### API 配置 ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id print(model) def main(): stream = True chat_completion = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "你好，介绍一下你自己，越详细越好。", } ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": main() 🌐 Web 应用访问 #### 📱 访问步骤 🔗 步骤一：获取访问链接 在服务实例概览页面中，点击 Web 应用对应的链接，即可直接进行模型服务 Web 访问。 💬 步骤二：开始对话 在模型服务 Web 页面输入框中输入问题，就可以和大模型进行对话了。 #### 🖼️ 界面展示 💡 访问提示 在服务实例概览页面中找到 Web 应用对应的链接，点击即可直接访问模型服务的 Web 界面。 ✅ 使用说明 在输入框中输入您的问题或需求，系统将实时响应并提供相应的模型服务。 🌟 Qwen2.5 开源模型 | 性能超越 Llama-405B，开源 AI 的新标杆

docs.text: 🚀 Qwen3 Large Language Model Next-Generation Intelligent Dialogue Model - Seamless Switching Between Thinking and Non-Thinking Modes 🎯 Product Overview Qwen3 is the latest generation large language model in the Qwen series, providing a series of Dense and Mixture of Experts (MOE) models. Based on extensive training, Qwen3 has achieved breakthrough progress in reasoning, instruction following, agent capabilities, and multilingual support. 💡 Core Innovation Qwen3 is the first to achieve intelligent switching between thinking mode and non-thinking mode, ensuring reasoning accuracy while considering response efficiency, providing optimal solutions for different application scenarios. ✨ Core Features 🧠 Dual-Mode Intelligent Switching Uniquely supports seamless switching between thinking mode (for complex logical reasoning, mathematics, and coding) and non-thinking mode (for efficient general dialogue), ensuring optimal performance in various scenarios. ⚡ Superior Reasoning Capabilities Significantly enhanced reasoning capabilities that surpass previous QwQ (in thinking mode) and Qwen2.5 instruction models (in non-thinking mode) in mathematics, code generation, and common sense logical reasoning. 🎭 Excellent Human Preference Alignment Outstanding performance in creative writing, role-playing, multi-turn dialogue, and instruction following, providing more natural, engaging, and immersive conversational experiences. 🤖 Leading Agent Capabilities Can precisely integrate external tools in both thinking and non-thinking modes, leading among open-source models in complex agent-based tasks. 🌍 Powerful Multilingual Support Supports over 100 languages and dialects with strong multilingual understanding, reasoning, instruction following, and generation capabilities. 🔄 Dual-Mode Working Mechanism 🤔 Thinking Mode Applicable Scenarios: • Complex mathematical reasoning • Code logic analysis • Multi-step problem solving • Scientific computation verification Characteristics: • Deep thinking and reasoning • Transparent and traceable process • Higher accuracy • Longer response time 💬 Non-Thinking Mode Applicable Scenarios: • Daily conversation • Quick information queries • Creative writing assistance • Role-playing interaction Characteristics: • Quick response • Natural and fluent • Efficient interaction • User-friendly experience 🎯 Intelligent Switching Mechanism Qwen3 can automatically select the most suitable working mode based on problem complexity and user needs, and also supports manual mode specification by users, ensuring optimal performance in various scenarios. 💻 Deployment Configuration 🔧 Hardware Configuration Requirements Model Specification Minimum VRAM Requirement Recommended Scenarios Performance Characteristics 0.6B / 1.7B / 4B / 8B 24G VRAM Lightweight applications, mobile deployment Fast response, resource-friendly 14B 48G VRAM Medium complexity tasks, enterprise applications Balanced performance and efficiency 30B / 32B 96G VRAM High-performance applications, professional services Powerful reasoning capabilities 235B 8× 96G VRAM Enterprise deployment, research applications Top-tier performance 💡 Selection Recommendations • Individual Developers : Recommend 0.6B-8B models, low cost and simple deployment • Small and Medium Enterprises : Recommend 14B model, optimal cost-performance ratio • Large Enterprises : Recommend 30B-32B models, powerful performance • Research Institutions : Recommend 235B model, top-tier capability support 📖 User Guide 💡 Quick Start After completing the model deployment, you can view the model usage instructions on the Computing Nest service instance overview page, which provides API call examples, internal network access addresses, public network access addresses, and ApiKey. 🔌 API Call Methods 🖥️ Curl Command Call 📋 Parameter Description • ${ServerIP} : IP address from internal or public network address • ${ApiKey} : ApiKey provided on the page • ${ModelName} : Model name Curl command calls can directly use the API call examples from the service instance overview page. The specific structure for calling the model API is as follows: curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "Write a letter to my daughter from the future year 2035, telling her to study technology well, become the master of technology, and promote technological and economic development; she is currently in 3rd grade" } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK Call ⚙️ Configuration Instructions • ${ApiKey} : Fill in the ApiKey from the page • ${ServerUrl} : Fill in the public or internal network address from the page, must include /v1 The following is Python example code: from openai import OpenAI ##### API Configuration ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id print(model) def main(): stream = True chat_completion = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "Hello, please introduce yourself in as much detail as possible.", } ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": main() 🌐 Web Application Access #### 📱 Access Steps 🔗 Step 1: Get Access Link On the service instance overview page, click the link corresponding to the Web application to directly access the model service Web interface. 💬 Step 2: Start Conversation Enter your question in the input box on the model service Web page to start conversing with the large language model. #### 🖼️ Interface Display 💡 Access Tips Find the link corresponding to the Web application on the service instance overview page and click it to directly access the model service Web interface. ✅ Usage Instructions Enter your questions or requirements in the input box, and the system will respond in real-time and provide corresponding model services. 🚀 Qwen3 Large Language Model | A New Era of Intelligent Dialogue, Perfect Integration of Thinking and Efficiency

docs.text: 🚀 Qwen3 大语言模型 新一代智能对话模型 - 思考与非思考模式无缝切换 🎯 产品简介 Qwen3 是 Qwen 系列最新一代的大语言模型，提供了一系列密集（Dense）和混合专家（MOE）模型。基于广泛的训练，Qwen3 在推理、指令跟随、代理能力和多语言支持方面取得了突破性的进展。 💡 核心创新 Qwen3 首次实现了思考模式与非思考模式的智能切换，在保证推理准确性的同时兼顾响应效率，为不同应用场景提供最优解决方案。 ✨ 核心特性 🧠 双模式智能切换 独特支持在思考模式（用于复杂逻辑推理、数学和编码）和非思考模式（用于高效通用对话）之间无缝切换，确保在各种场景下的最佳性能。 ⚡ 超越前代推理能力 显著增强的推理能力，在数学、代码生成和常识逻辑推理方面超越了之前的 QwQ（在思考模式下）和 Qwen2.5 指令模型（在非思考模式下）。 🎭 卓越人类偏好对齐 在创意写作、角色扮演、多轮对话和指令跟随方面表现出色，提供更自然、更吸引人和更具沉浸感的对话体验。 🤖 领先 Agent 能力 可以在思考和非思考模式下精确集成外部工具，在复杂的基于代理的任务中在开源模型中表现领先。 🌍 强大多语言支持 支持 100 多种语言和方言，具有强大的多语言理解、推理、指令跟随和生成能力。 🔄 双模式工作机制 🤔 思考模式 适用场景： • 复杂数学推理 • 代码逻辑分析 • 多步骤问题解决 • 科学计算验证 特点： • 深度思考推理 • 过程透明可追溯 • 准确率更高 • 响应时间较长 💬 非思考模式 适用场景： • 日常对话交流 • 快速信息查询 • 创意写作辅助 • 角色扮演互动 特点： • 快速响应 • 自然流畅 • 高效互动 • 体验友好 🎯 智能切换机制 Qwen3 能够根据问题复杂度和用户需求自动选择最适合的工作模式，也支持用户手动指定模式，确保在各种场景下都能提供最优的性能表现。 💻 部署配置 🔧 硬件配置要求 模型规格 最低显存要求 推荐场景 性能特点 0.6B / 1.7B / 4B / 8B 24G 显存 轻量级应用、移动端部署 快速响应、资源友好 14B 48G 显存 中等复杂度任务、企业应用 平衡性能与效率 30B / 32B 96G 显存 高性能应用、专业服务 强大推理能力 235B 8× 96G 显存 企业级部署、科研应用 顶级性能表现 💡 选择建议 • 个人开发者 ：推荐 0.6B-8B 模型，成本低、部署简单 • 中小企业 ：推荐 14B 模型，性价比最优 • 大型企业 ：推荐 30B-32B 模型，性能强劲 • 科研机构 ：推荐 235B 模型，顶级能力支持 📖 使用说明 💡 快速开始 在完成模型部署后，可以在计算巢服务实例概览页面看到模型的使用方式，里面提供了 API 调用示例、内网访问地址、公网访问地址、Web应用地址和 ApiKey。 🔌 API 调用方式 🖥️ Curl 命令调用 📋 参数说明 • ${ServerIP} ：内网地址或公网地址中的 IP 地址 • ${ApiKey} ：页面提供的 ApiKey • ${ModelName} ：模型名称 Curl "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "给闺女写一份来自未来2035的信，同时告诉她要好好学习科技，做科技的主人，推动科技，经济发展；她现在是3年级" } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK 调用 ⚙️ 配置说明 • ${ApiKey} ：填写页面上的 ApiKey • ${ServerUrl} docs.text: Qwen3 是 Qwen 系列最新一代的大语言模型，提供了一系列密集（Dense）和混合专家（MOE）模型。基于广泛的训练，Qwen3 在推理、指令跟随、代理能力和多语言支持方面取得了突破性的进展。 💡 核心创新 Qwen3 首次实现了思考模式与非思考模式的智能切换，在保证推理准确性的同时兼顾响应效率，为不同应用场景提供最优解决方案。
docs.title: 🎯 产品简介

docs.text: 🧠 双模式智能切换 独特支持在思考模式（用于复杂逻辑推理、数学和编码）和非思考模式（用于高效通用对话）之间无缝切换，确保在各种场景下的最佳性能。 ⚡ 超越前代推理能力 显著增强的推理能力，在数学、代码生成和常识逻辑推理方面超越了之前的 QwQ（在思考模式下）和 Qwen2.5 指令模型（在非思考模式下）。 🎭 卓越人类偏好对齐 在创意写作、角色扮演、多轮对话和指令跟随方面表现出色，提供更自然、更吸引人和更具沉浸感的对话体验。 🤖 领先 Agent 能力 可以在思考和非思考模式下精确集成外部工具，在复杂的基于代理的任务中在开源模型中表现领先。 🌍 强大多语言支持 支持 100 多种语言和方言，具有强大的多语言理解、推理、指令跟随和生成能力。
docs.title: ✨ 核心特性

docs.text: 💡 快速开始 在完成模型部署后，可以在计算巢服务实例概览页面看到模型的使用方式，里面提供了 API 调用示例、内网访问地址、公网访问地址、Web应用地址和 ApiKey。
docs.title: 📖 使用说明

docs.text: 📋 参数说明 • ${ServerIP} ：内网地址或公网地址中的 IP 地址 • ${ApiKey} ：页面提供的 ApiKey • ${ModelName} ：模型名称 Curl 命令调用可以直接使用服务实例概览页面中的 API 调用示例，调用模型 API 的具体结构如下： curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "给闺女写一份来自未来2035的信，同时告诉她要好好学习科技，做科技的主人，推动科技，经济发展；她现在是3年级" } ] }'
docs.title: 🖥️ Curl 命令调用

docs.text: ⚙️ 配置说明 • ${ApiKey} ：填写页面上的 ApiKey • ${ServerUrl} ：填写页面上的公网地址或内网地址，需要带上 /v1 以下为 Python 示例代码： from openai import OpenAI ##### API 配置 ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id print(model) def main(): stream = True chat_completion = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "你好，介绍一下你自己，越详细越好。", } ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": main()
docs.title: 🐍 Python SDK 调用

docs.text: 🧠 QwQ Reasoning Model Qwen Series Professional Reasoning Model - Breakthrough in Thinking and Reasoning Capabilities 🎯 Product Overview QwQ is a reasoning model in the Qwen series. Compared to traditional instruction-tuned models, QwQ with thinking and reasoning capabilities can significantly improve performance in downstream tasks, especially when solving difficult problems. 💡 Core Advantage Through the "Chain-of-Thought" mechanism, QwQ can perform step-by-step reasoning like humans, demonstrating excellence in complex problem solving. ✨ Core Features 📊 Mathematical Reasoning Capability Supports analysis and solving of mathematical problems including algebra, geometry, calculus, and can derive complex formulas step by step, providing strong support for mathematics education and research. 💻 Code Generation and Understanding Can generate high-quality Python/Java/C++ code based on natural language descriptions, and supports code debugging and optimization, improving development efficiency. 🔗 Multi-step Reasoning Through the "Chain-of-Thought" mechanism, solves complex problems step by step, such as step-by-step derivation of mathematical proofs, ensuring the reasoning process is clear and traceable. 🎯 Reinforcement Learning Fine-tuning Optimizes reasoning accuracy through feedback mechanisms, performing exceptionally well in tasks requiring precise calculations, continuously improving model performance. 🚀 Application Scenarios 🎓 Education Field 📐 Mathematics Teaching • Step-by-step analysis of complex math problems • Providing detailed derivation processes • Supporting multiple solution method demonstrations 💡 Programming Education • Code logic analysis and explanation • Detailed algorithm concept elaboration • Programming error diagnosis and correction 🏢 Professional Applications 🔬 Research Analysis • Complex data analysis reasoning • Experimental result logical verification • Theoretical model construction support ⚖️ Logical Reasoning • Legal clause logical analysis • Business decision reasoning support • Complex problem decomposition and solving 📖 User Guide 💡 Quick Start After completing the model deployment, you can view the model usage instructions on the Computing Nest service instance overview page, which provides API call examples, internal network access addresses, public network access addresses, and ApiKey. 🔌 API Call Methods 🖥️ Curl Command Call 📋 Parameter Description • ${ServerIP} : IP address from internal or public network address • ${ApiKey} : ApiKey provided on the page • ${ModelName} : Model name Curl command calls can directly use the API call examples from the service instance overview page. The specific structure for calling the model API is as follows: curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "Write a letter to my daughter from the future year 2035, telling her to study technology well, become the master of technology, and promote technological and economic development; she is currently in 3rd grade" } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK Call ⚙️ Configuration Instructions • ${ApiKey} : Fill in the ApiKey from the page • ${ServerUrl} : Fill in the public or internal network address from the page, must include /v1 The following is Python example code: from openai import OpenAI ##### API Configuration ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id print(model) def main(): stream = True chat_completion = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "Hello, please introduce yourself in as much detail as possible.", } ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": main() 🌐 Web Application Access #### 📱 Access Steps 🔗 Step 1: Get Access Link On the service instance overview page, click the link corresponding to the Web application to directly access the model service Web interface. 💬 Step 2: Start Conversation Enter your question in the input box on the model service Web page to start conversing with the large language model. #### 🖼️ Interface Display 💡 Access Tips Find the link corresponding to the Web application on the service instance overview page and click it to directly access the model service Web interface. ✅ Usage Instructions Enter your questions or requirements in the input box, and the system will respond in real-time and provide corresponding model services. 🧠 QwQ Reasoning Model | Making AI Think and Reason Like Humans

docs.text: 🧠 QwQ 推理模型 Qwen 系列专业推理模型 - 思考与推理能力的突破 🎯 产品简介 QwQ 是 Qwen 系列的推理模型。与传统的指令调优模型相比，具备思考和推理能力的 QwQ 在下游任务中，尤其是在解决难题时，能够显著提升性能。 💡 核心优势 通过"思维链（Chain-of-Thought）"机制，QwQ 能够像人类一样进行逐步推理，在复杂问题解决方面表现卓越。 ✨ 核心特性 📊 数学推理能力 支持代数、几何、微积分等数学问题的解析与解答，可逐步推导复杂公式，为数学教育和科研提供强大支持。 💻 代码生成与理解 能根据自然语言描述生成高质量的 Python/Java/C++ 等代码，并支持代码调试与优化，提升开发效率。 🔗 多步骤推理 通过"思维链（Chain-of-Thought）"机制，分步解决复杂问题，例如分步推导数学证明，确保推理过程清晰可追溯。 🎯 强化学习微调 通过反馈机制优化推理准确率，尤其在需要精确计算的任务中表现优异，持续提升模型性能。 🚀 应用场景 🎓 教育领域 📐 数学教学 • 逐步解析复杂数学题目 • 提供详细的推导过程 • 支持多种解题方法展示 💡 编程教育 • 代码逻辑分析与讲解 • 算法思路详细阐述 • 编程错误诊断与修正 🏢 专业应用 🔬 科研分析 • 复杂数据分析推理 • 实验结果逻辑验证 • 理论模型构建支持 ⚖️ 逻辑推理 • 法律条文逻辑分析 • 商业决策推理支持 • 复杂问题分解求解 📖 使用说明 💡 快速开始 在完成模型部署后，可以在计算巢服务实例概览页面看到模型的使用方式，里面提供了 API 调用示例、内网访问地址、公网访问地址、Web应用地址和 ApiKey。 🔌 API 调用方式 🖥️ Curl 命令调用 📋 参数说明 • ${ServerIP} ：内网地址或公网地址中的 IP 地址 • ${ApiKey} ：页面提供的 ApiKey • ${ModelName} ：模型名称 Curl 命令调用可以直接使用服务实例概览页面中的 API 调用示例，调用模型 API 的具体结构如下： curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "给闺女写一份来自未来2035的信，同时告诉她要好好学习科技，做科技的主人，推动科技，经济发展；她现在是3年级" } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK 调用 ⚙️ 配置说明 • ${ApiKey} ：填写页面上的 ApiKey • ${ServerUrl} ：填写页面上的公网地址或内网地址，需要带上 /v1 以下为 Python 示例代码： from openai import OpenAI ##### API 配置 ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id print(model) def main(): stream = True chat_completion = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "你好，介绍一下你自己，越详细越好。", } ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": main() 🌐 Web 应用访问 #### 📱 访问步骤 🔗 步骤一：获取访问链接 在服务实例概览页面中，点击 Web 应用对应的链接，即可直接进行模型服务 Web 访问。 💬 步骤二：开始对话 在模型服务 Web 页面输入框中输入问题，就可以和大模型进行对话了。 #### 🖼️ 界面展示 💡 访问提示 在服务实例概览页面中找到 Web 应用对应的链接，点击即可直接访问模型服务的 Web 界面。 ✅ 使用说明 在输入框中输入您的问题或需求，系统将实时响应并提供相应的模型服务。 🧠 QwQ 推理模型 | 让 AI 像人类一样思考推理

docs.text: 📖 使用说明 💡 快速开始 在完成模型部署后，可以在计算巢服务实例概览页面看到模型的使用方式，里面提供了 API 调用示例、内网访问地址、公网访问地址、Web应用地址和 ApiKey。 🔌 API 调用方式 🖥️ Curl 命令调用 📋 参数说明 • ${ServerIP} ：内网地址或公网地址中的 IP 地址 • ${ApiKey} ：页面提供的 ApiKey • ${ModelName} ：模型名称 Curl 命令调用可以直接使用服务实例概览页面中的 API 调用示例，调用模型 API 的具体结构如下： curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "给闺女写一份来自未来2035的信，同时告诉她要好好学习科技，做科技的主人，推动科技，经济发展；她现在是3年级" } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK 调用 ⚙️ 配置说明 • ${ApiKey} ：填写页面上的 ApiKey • ${ServerUrl} ：填写页面上的公网地址或内网地址，需要带上 /v1 以下为 Python 示例代码： from openai import OpenAI ##### API 配置 ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id print(model) def main(): stream = True chat_completion = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "你好，介绍一下你自己，越详细越好。", } ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": main() 🌐 Web 应用访问 #### 📱 访问步骤 🔗 步骤一：获取访问链接 在服务实例概览页面中，点击 Web 应用对应的链接，即可直接进行模型服务 Web 访问。 💬 步骤二：开始对话 在模型服务 Web 页面输入框中输入问题，就可以和大模型进行对话了。 #### 🖼️ 界面展示 💡 访问提示 在服务实例概览页面中找到 Web 应用对应的链接，点击即可直接访问模型服务的 Web 界面。 ✅ 使用说明 在输入框中输入您的问题或需求，系统将实时响应并提供相应的模型服务。

docs.text: 📋 参数说明 • ${ServerIP} ：内网地址或公网地址中的 IP 地址 • ${ApiKey} ：页面提供的 ApiKey • ${ModelName} ：模型名称 Curl 命令调用可以直接使用服务实例概览页面中的 API 调用示例，调用模型 API 的具体结构如下： curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "给闺女写一份来自未来2035的信，同时告诉她要好好学习科技，做科技的主人，推动科技，经济发展；她现在是3年级" } ] }'
docs.title: 🖥️ Curl 命令调用

docs.text: ⚙️ 配置说明 • ${ApiKey} ：填写页面上的 ApiKey • ${ServerUrl} ：填写页面上的公网地址或内网地址，需要带上 /v1 以下为 Python 示例代码： from openai import OpenAI ##### API 配置 ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id print(model) def main(): stream = True chat_completion = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "你好，介绍一下你自己，越详细越好。", } ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": main()

docs.text: #### 📱 访问步骤
docs.title: 🌐 Web 应用访问

docs.text: 📖 User Guide 💡 After Deployment After completing the model deployment, you can view the model usage instructions on the Computing Nest service instance overview page, which provides API call examples, internal network access addresses, public network access addresses (available after enabling public network access), and Api_Key. 🔌 API Call Methods 🖥️ Curl Command Call 📋 Parameter Description • ${ServerIP} : IP address from internal or public network address • ${ApiKey} : ApiKey provided on the page • ${ModelName} : Model name 🖼️ Image Format Support The image_url parameter supports two formats: • HTTP URL : e.g., https://modelscope.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/resource/qwen.png • Base64 Encoding : data:image/jpeg;base64,<base64 encoded image format> Curl command calls can directly use the API call examples from the service instance overview page. The specific structure for calling the model API is as follows: curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a helpful assistant." }, { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "image_url", "image_url": { "url": "data:image/jpeg;base64,<base64 encoded image format>" } }, { "type": "text", "text": "How many sheep are there in the picture?" } ] } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK Call ⚙️ Configuration Instructions • ${ApiKey} : Fill in the ApiKey from the page • ${ServerUrl} : Fill in the public or internal network address from the page, must include /v1 The following is Python example code that supports image and video processing: import base64 import requests from openai import OpenAI ##### API Configuration ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id def encode_base64_content_from_url(content_url: str) -> str: """Encode a content retrieved from a remote url to base64 format.""" with requests.get(content_url) as response: response.raise_for_status() result = base64.b64encode(response.content).decode("utf-8") return result def infer_image(): image_url = "https://qianwen-res.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/QVQ/demo.png" stream = True image_base64 = encode_base64_content_from_url(image_url) chat_completion_from_base64 = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "Answer in Chinese, what number should be in the box in the image?", }, { "type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": f"data:image/jpeg;base64,{image_base64}"}, }, ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion_from_base64: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion_from_base64.choices[0].message.content print(result) def infer_video(): video_url = "https://pai-quickstart-predeploy-hangzhou.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/modelscope/algorithms/ms-swift/video_demo.mp4" stream = True video_base64 = encode_base64_content_from_url(video_url) chat_completion_from_base64 = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ {"type": "text", "text": "Please describe the video content"}, { "type": "video_url", "video_url": {"url": f"data:video/mp4;base64,{video_base64}"}, }, ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=512, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion_from_base64: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion_from_base64.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": infer_image() infer_video() 🌐 Web Application Access #### 📱 Access Steps 🔗 Step 1: Get Access Link On the service instance overview page, click the link corresponding to the Web application to directly access the model service Web interface. 💬 Step 2: Start Conversation Enter your question in the input box on the model service Web page to start conversing with the large language model. #### 🖼️ Interface Display 💡 Access Tips Find the link corresponding to the Web application on the service instance overview page and click it to directly access the model service Web interface. ✅ Usage Instructions Enter your questions or requirements in the input box, and the system will respond in real-time and provide corresponding model services.

docs.text: ⚙️ Configuration Instructions • ${ApiKey} : Fill in the ApiKey from the page • ${ServerUrl} : Fill in the public or internal network address from the page, must include /v1 The following is Python example code that supports image and video processing: import base64 import requests from openai import OpenAI ##### API Configuration ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id def encode_base64_content_from_url(content_url: str) -> str: """Encode a content retrieved from a remote url to base64 format.""" with requests.get(content_url) as response: response.raise_for_status() result = base64.b64encode(response.content).decode("utf-8") return result def infer_image(): image_url = "https://qianwen-res.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/QVQ/demo.png" stream = True image_base64 = encode_base64_content_from_url(image_url) chat_completion_from_base64 = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "Answer in Chinese, what number should be in the box in the image?", }, { "type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": f"data:image/jpeg;base64,{image_base64}"}, }, ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion_from_base64: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion_from_base64.choices[0].message.content print(result) def infer_video(): video_url = "https://pai-quickstart-predeploy-hangzhou.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/modelscope/algorithms/ms-swift/video_demo.mp4" stream = True video_base64 = encode_base64_content_from_url(video_url) chat_completion_from_base64 = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ {"type": "text", "text": "Please describe the video content"}, { "type": "video_url", "video_url": {"url": f"data:video/mp4;base64,{video_base64}"}, }, ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=512, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion_from_base64: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion_from_base64.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": infer_image() infer_video()

docs.text: 📖 使用说明 💡 部署完成后 在完成模型部署后，可以在计算巢服务实例概览页面看到模型的使用方式，里面提供了 API 调用示例、内网访问地址、公网访问地址（开启公网访问后会有）和 Api_Key。 🔌 API 调用方式 🖥️ Curl 命令调用 📋 参数说明 • ${ServerIP} ：内网地址或公网地址中的 IP 地址 • ${ApiKey} ：页面提供的 ApiKey • ${ModelName} ：模型名称 🖼️ 图片格式支持 image_url 参数支持两种格式： • HTTP URL ：如 https://modelscope.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/resource/qwen.png • Base64 编码 ： data:image/jpeg;base64,<图片的 base64 编码格式> Curl 命令调用可以直接使用服务实例概览页面中的 API 调用示例，调用模型 API 的具体结构如下： curl -X Post http://${ServerIP}:8000/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "Authorization: ${ApiKey}" \ -d '{ "model": "${ModelName}", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a helpful assistant." }, { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "image_url", "image_url": { "url": "data:image/jpeg;base64,<图片的 base64 编码格式>" } }, { "type": "text", "text": "How many sheep are there in the picture?" } ] } ] }' 🐍 Python SDK 调用 ⚙️ 配置说明 • ${ApiKey} ：填写页面上的 ApiKey • ${ServerUrl} ：填写页面上的公网地址或内网地址，需要带上 /v1 以下为 Python 示例代码，支持图像和视频处理： import base64 import requests from openai import OpenAI ##### API 配置 ##### openai_api_key = "${ApiKey}" openai_api_base = "${ServerUrl}" client = OpenAI( api_key=openai_api_key, base_url=openai_api_base, ) models = client.models.list() model = models.data[0].id def encode_base64_content_from_url(content_url: str) -> str: """Encode a content retrieved from a remote url to base64 format.""" with requests.get(content_url) as response: response.raise_for_status() result = base64.b64encode(response.content).decode("utf-8") return result def infer_image(): image_url = "https://qianwen-res.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/QVQ/demo.png" stream = True image_base64 = encode_base64_content_from_url(image_url) chat_completion_from_base64 = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "使用中文回答，图中方框处应该是数字多少?", }, { "type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": f"data:image/jpeg;base64,{image_base64}"}, }, ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=1024, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion_from_base64: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion_from_base64.choices[0].message.content print(result) def infer_video(): video_url = "https://pai-quickstart-predeploy-hangzhou.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/modelscope/algorithms/ms-swift/video_demo.mp4" stream = True video_base64 = encode_base64_content_from_url(video_url) chat_completion_from_base64 = client.chat.completions.create( messages=[ { "role": "user", "content": [ {"type": "text", "text": "请描述下视频内容"}, { "type": "video_url", "video_url": {"url": f"data:video/mp4;base64,{video_base64}"}, }, ], } ], model=model, max_completion_tokens=512, stream=stream, ) if stream: for chunk in chat_completion_from_base64: print(chunk.choices[0].delta.content, end="") else: result = chat_completion_from_base64.choices[0].message.content print(result) if __name__ == "__main__": infer_image() infer_video() 🌐 Web 应用访问 #### 📱 访问步骤 🔗 步骤一：获取访问链接 在服务实例概览页面中，点击 Web 应用对应的链接，即可直接进行模型服务 Web 访问。 💬 步骤二：开始对话 在模型服务 Web 页面输入框中输入问题，就可以和大模型进行对话了。 #### 🖼️ 界面展示 💡 访问提示 在服务实例概览页面中找到 Web 应用对应的链接，点击即可直接访问模型服务的 Web 界面。 ✅ 使用说明 在输入框中输入您的问题或需求，系统将实时响应并提供相应的模型服务，对于多模态需要输入图片的场景，可以在输入框右下角选择图片进行上传。
